paper_citation_primary: To validate our Behavioral Proxy Ground Truth, we examined a random sample of 113 phishing cashout transactions. Accounts with Max Outgoing < 0.5 ETH (N=15, 13.3%) were excluded from the primary validation analysis to avoid circularity with the value-based annotation criterion. For the remaining 98 accounts (Max Outgoing >= 0.5 ETH), 94 cases (95.9%) exhibited cashout behavior consistent with forensic patterns — funds flowing to known exchange deposit addresses, DeFi protocols, or fresh low-activity wallets (95% Wilson CI: [90.0%, 98.4%]).
paper_citation_hedge: We acknowledge that N=15 accounts with Max Outgoing < 0.5 ETH could not be automatically confirmed and represent an upper bound of 13.3% label noise in our 2,483-account Ground Truth. These small-value cases may reflect phishers with minimal loot or non-cashout OUT transactions.
